title: 我的博客
subTitle: 记录生活与技术
style: body { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e0c3fc 0%, #8ec5fc 100%) !important; background-attachment: fixed !important; font-family: -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif; } .markdown-body { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85) !important; backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px 0 rgba(31, 38, 135, 0.37); padding: 30px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18); min-height: 80vh; } .Header, .footer { background: transparent !important; border: none !important; } .side-nav { position: fixed; left: 20px; top: 80px; bottom: 40px; width: 220px; padding: 15px; overflow-y: auto; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6); backdrop-filter: blur(5px); border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); z-index: 9999; } .side-nav-group-title { font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px; color: #555; margin: 15px 0 8px 5px; border-bottom: 2px solid #8ec5fc; display: inline-block; } .side-nav a { display: block; text-decoration: none; color: #444; font-size: 13px; padding: 6px 10px; margin-bottom: 4px; border-radius: 6px; transition: 0.2s; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .side-nav a:hover { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #8ec5fc, #e0c3fc); color: white; } @media (min-width: 1400px) { .markdown-body { margin-left: 260px; max-width: calc(100% - 280px); } } @media (max-width: 1399px) { .side-nav { display: none; } .markdown-body { width: 100%; } }
script: <script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { console.log('Gmeek Custom Script Loaded'); const repoName = document.querySelector('meta[name="repository-name"]') ? document.querySelector('meta[name="repository-name"]').content : ''; let blogBaseUrl = '/blogBase.json'; if (window.location.pathname.includes('/' + repoName)) { blogBaseUrl = '/' + repoName + '/blogBase.json'; } fetch(blogBaseUrl).then(res => res.json()).then(data => { console.log('Data loaded:', data); const nav = document.createElement('div'); nav.className = 'side-nav'; const posts = Object.values(data); const groups = {}; posts.forEach(post => { const label = post.labels[0] || 'Unlabeled'; if (!groups[label]) groups[label] = []; groups[label].push(post); }); Object.keys(groups).sort().forEach(label => { const title = document.createElement('div'); title.className = 'side-nav-group-title'; title.innerText = label; nav.appendChild(title); groups[label].forEach(item => { const link = document.createElement('a'); link.href = item.postUrl; link.innerText = item.postTitle; link.title = item.postTitle; nav.appendChild(link); }); }); document.body.appendChild(nav); }).catch(err => console.error('TOC Error:', err)); });</script>
